name: aegis
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Aegis instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Aegis tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Aegis through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Aegis Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Aegis only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
